title: Velvety Chinese Plum Tomatoes Stir-fry
description: A one-pot Mediterranean-friendly dish featuring velvety plum tomatoes with a touch of umami and sweetness from pickled vegetables, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup pickled ginger and spring onion mixture
1/4 cup pickled carrots and red onions (optional)
2 tablespoons oyster sauce (or soy sauce for non-vegetarians)

instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add onions and garlic, stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add plum tomatoes, red bell pepper, oyster sauce, and salt. Stir well to combine all ingredients.
Pour in soy sauce and rice vinegar. Increase heat to high, bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover the pan, let it simmer for about 10 minutes or until the liquid is reduced slightly and flavors are well combined.
Remove from heat, add pickled ginger and spring onion mixture and scallions. Stir gently to combine with vegetables.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
